overall.description: A static nighttime scene in a snowy wilderness showing a campfire burning next to a canvas tent. The warm firelight illuminates the snow-covered ground while stars are visible in the clear dark sky above. The footage appears to be from a survival video game with cinematic quality.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy wilderness campsite with tent and campfire

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint watching the campfire burn in the snowy night

entered.detail: burning fire with rising smoke providing warm light in the snowy darkness
dark canvas tent pitched on the snow to the right of the fire
snow-covered ground illuminated by firelight extending into darkness
clear night sky filled with visible stars above the snowy landscape

segments.scene_description: A serene winter night scene at a remote campsite. A campfire burns steadily in the center, casting warm orange light on the surrounding snow and creating rising smoke. To the right, a canvas tent stands pitched on the snow. The clear starry sky is visible above, and the camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the peaceful isolation of the snowy wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene and static moment of isolation within a snowy wilderness under a vast night sky. It begins with a focus on a steadily burning campfire that casts a warm orange glow across the surrounding frost. As the light flickers, the view encompasses a canvas tent pitched nearby on the deep snow, emphasizing the solitude of the remote campsite. The scene then expands upward to reveal a clear, star-filled sky that looms over the rising smoke and the quiet, frozen landscape.
